description: Additive output-schema extension: AgentTelemetry block (schema_version 2.2) enabling CI-queryable agent audit trail with structured AgentAction entries per severity gate decision.

models: AgentActionType(StrEnum) — six action categories (auto_fix, review_request, block, revert, feedback, nudge)
AgentAction dataclass — per-action audit entry with finding_id, severity, gate, safe_to_commit, feedback_mark, timestamp, metadata
AgentTelemetry dataclass — container with session_id, schema_version=2.2, total_auto/review/block properties
RepoAnalysis.agent_telemetry: AgentTelemetry | None = None (new optional field)
intent: handoff.py: removed 'sobald Schema 2.2 aktiv ist, siehe Paket 1B' placeholders
drift.agent.prompt.md: regenerated with final Schema 2.2 references

precision_recall.note: Schema extension only; no signal heuristic changed. Contract tests cover import, field defaults, counter properties, null/non-null JSON serialisation.

backward_compat: additive — existing consumers ignoring unknown keys are unaffected; schema_version bump from 2.1 to 2.2 is the only breaking surface
